title: LEND $HYPE with @hyperlendx
summary_title: Lending hype collateral and looping stablecoins to 50-60% yield on Hyperliquid EVM
summary_description: Hyperland launches lending/borrowing on Hyperliquid EVM with plans for portfolio margin, collateralized perps, and yield-bearing strategies.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces Hyperland as first NFT project on testnet 2022
Ness shares background: March 2020 entry, Olympus participant, held 30% of 4-digit ENS numbers
Realized EVM opportunity to enable HYPE as collateral for futures trading
Chose Hyperliquid for its HLP vault and early adoption mindset
Long-term vision: portfolio margin on L1, banking infrastructure on EVM
Precompiles enable collateralizing HLP vault, yield-bearing perpetuals
Looping HLP 2-3x yields 50-60% APY on stables; potential for BTC/ETH strategies
Points system signals upcoming Hyperland token with governance and revenue share

pull_quote: We're basically the Chase banking infrastructure on the EVM side, allowing Hyperliquid to be your Robinhood.
